summary.en: Fullstack Developer and Technical Lead with over 5 years of experience in banking and enterprise systems development. Experienced in leading developer squads in building and re-engineering Merchant Management Systems (MMS) and Brimerchant in OCP (OpenShift) environments using microservices architecture. Proficient in managing CI/CD pipelines using Bamboo, containerization with Docker & Kubernetes, and integration with large systems like Kafka, Redis, and ElasticSearch.
summary.id: Fullstack Developer dan Technical Lead dengan lebih dari 5 tahun pengalaman dalam pengembangan sistem perbankan dan enterprise. Berpengalaman memimpin squad developer dalam membangun dan merekayasa ulang sistem Merchant Management (MMS) dan Brimerchant di lingkungan OCP (OpenShift) dengan pendekatan microservices architecture. Terbiasa mengelola pipeline CI/CD menggunakan Bamboo, containerization dengan Docker & Kubernetes, serta integrasi dengan sistem besar seperti Kafka, Redis, dan ElasticSearch.

description.en: Responsible for development, architecture, and optimization of Brimerchant and MMS systems. Leading small teams (squads) to ensure projects meet timelines and BRI quality standards.
description.id: Bertanggung jawab dalam pengembangan, arsitektur, serta optimalisasi sistem Brimerchant dan MMS. Memimpin tim kecil (squad) untuk memastikan proyek berjalan sesuai timeline dan standar kualitas BRI.

description.en: Managing CI/CD pipelines, containerization, and monitoring system performance using ElasticSearch.
description.id: Mengelola pipeline CI/CD, kontainerisasi, dan monitoring performa sistem menggunakan ElasticSearch.

description.en: Developing software solutions with focus on JavaScript and clean coding practices.
description.id: Mengembangkan solusi perangkat lunak dengan fokus pada JavaScript dan praktik clean coding.

description.en: A collaborative API development tool similar to Postman, designed for team efficiency.
description.id: Aplikasi kolaborasi pengembangan API mirip seperti Postman, dirancang untuk efisiensi tim.

description.en: Merchant management and payment solution platform for BRI.
description.id: Platform manajemen merchant dan solusi pembayaran untuk BRI.

description.en: Re-architecting the Merchant Management System to a modern microservices structure.
description.id: Membangun ulang arsitektur Merchant Management System ke struktur microservices modern.

description.en: Food delivery application built with React Native.
description.id: Aplikasi pengiriman makanan yang dibangun dengan React Native.
